name: Id

aliases.name: Id
aliases.comment:
The basis for making a Id type, has one generic type argument which should be an internal type to the module the Id type is defined in.

    module UserId exposing(Id)

    import Id

    type alias Id = Id.Id IdInternal

    type IdInternal = IdInternal

values.name: debugId
values.comment: Create an Id with an arbitrary value for debugging purposes. Requires 'Debug.todo' as a first argument
values.type: (String.String -> Basics.Never) -> Basics.Int -> Id.Id a

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for `Id`
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.Id a)

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode `Id` to a JSON value
values.type: Id.Id a -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: parser
values.comment: Parser for 'Id'
values.type: Parser.Parser (Id.Id a)

values.name: toString
values.comment: Converts an Id into a string representing the number inside the Id
values.type: Id.Id a -> String.String

name: Id.Counter

aliases.name: Counter
aliases.comment: Counter type which is used to create [`Id`](Id#Id) values

values.name: accountForId
values.comment:
Account for a single Ids.
This should not be necessary if you always make sure to use the counter result from [`newId`](Id.Counter#newId), but can be used to sanitize the counter after encoding and decoding a counter and values
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: accountForIds
values.comment:
Account for a list of Ids.
This should not be necessary if you always make sure to use the counter result from [`newId`](Id.Counter#newId), but can be used to sanitize the counter after encoding and decoding a counter and values
values.type: List.List (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: accountForItemIds
values.comment:
Same as [`accountForIds`](Id.Counter#accountForIds) but can be used for a list of values containing an [`Id`](Id#Id)

    newCounter = accountForItemIds .id users counter
values.type: (item -> Internal.Id a) -> List.List item -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for 'Counter'
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.Counter.Counter id)

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode 'Counter' to a JSON value
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter id -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: giveIds
values.comment: Assign Ids to a number of values, make sure to use the new counter to create any new Ids
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> List.List b -> ( List.List c, Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) )

values.name: new
values.comment: Create a new counter
values.type: a -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: newId
values.comment: Creates a new [`Id`](Id#Id) and advanced the counter, make sure to use the new counter to create any new Ids
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> ( Internal.Id a, Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) )

values.name: newId2
values.comment: Same as [`newId`](Id.Counter#newId) but creates 2 Ids instead of 1
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> ( Internal.Id a, Internal.Id a, Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) )

values.name: newId3
values.comment: Same as [`newId`](Id.Counter#newId) but creates 3 Ids instead of 1
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> ( { id1 : Internal.Id a, id2 : Internal.Id a, id3 : Internal.Id a }, Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) )

values.name: newId4
values.comment: Same as [`newId`](Id.Counter#newId) but creates 4 Ids instead of 1
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> ( { id1 : Internal.Id a, id2 : Internal.Id a, id3 : Internal.Id a, id4 : Internal.Id a }, Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) )

values.name: sanitizeIds
values.comment: Account for all used Ids in the counter (as in [`accountForIds`](Id.Counter#accountForIds)) and give new Ids to any items that have a duplicate [`Id`](Id#Id)
values.type: (val -> Internal.Id a) -> (val -> Internal.Id a -> val) -> List.List val -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> ( List.List val, Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) )

name: Id.CounterDict

aliases.name: CounterDict
aliases.comment: A dictionary with a id counter

values.name: add
values.comment: Add a value to the Dictionary and assign it a new [`Id`](Id#Id).
values.type: value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> ( Internal.Id a, Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: addInto
values.comment: Same as as [add](Id.Dict#add) but only returns the Dictionary
values.type: value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: addList
values.comment: Add a list of values to the Dictionary and assign them [`Id`](Id#Id)s
values.type: List.List value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for [`CounterDict`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict)
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id does not appear in the second dictionary.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Internal.Dict o2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create a empty `CounterDict`
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode [`CounterDict`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict) to a JSON value
values.type: (value -> Json.Decode.Value) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id id) value -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only the Id-value pairs that pass the given test.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: filterMap
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in the dictionary and filter out the values that return Nothing.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> Maybe.Maybe c) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) c

values.name: fold
values.comment: Fold over the Id-value pairs in a dictionary from lowest Id to highest Id.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> c

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Create a new `CounterDict` from a list of values and assign an [`Id`](Id#Id) to every value
values.type: Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> List.List value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value associated with a Id. If the Id is not found, return Nothing.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: getCounter
values.comment: Get the counter from a counter dict
values.type: a -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: getFrom
values.comment: Same as [get](Id.Dict#get) but with the arguments swapped, useful for pipelines.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Internal.Id a -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: ids
values.comment: Get all of the Ids in a dictionary, sorted from lowest to highest.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List (Internal.Id a)

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a Id-value pair into a dictionary. Replaces value when there is a collision.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id appears in the second dictionary. Preference is given to values in the first dictionary.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Internal.Dict o2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a dictionary is empty.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: leakyDecoder
values.comment:
A 'leaky' JSON Decoder for [`CounterDict`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict).
This decoder will try to succeed to even if parts of json value can't be decoded.
If the counter can't be decoded a new counter will be assigned, accounting for all used Ids in the dictionary.
If any items in the dictionary have a invalid Id they will be assigned a new Id.
If any items in the dictionary cannot be decoded they will be skipped.
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a dictionary.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) c

values.name: map2
values.comment: Apply a function to values that appear in both dictionaries and create a new dictionary with the results, values that don't appear in all dictionaries are skipped.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c -> d) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Internal.Dict c2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) d

values.name: map3
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Dict.map2`](Id.Dict#map2) but for 3 dictionaries
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Internal.Dict c2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Internal.Dict c3 (Internal.Id a) d -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) e

values.name: map4
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Dict.map2`](Id.Dict#map2) but for 4 dictionaries
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) b -> Internal.Dict c2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Internal.Dict c3 (Internal.Id a) d -> Internal.Dict c4 (Internal.Id a) e -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) f

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a Id is in a dictionary.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: partition
values.comment:
Partition a dictionary according to some test.
The first dictionary contains all Id-value pairs which passed the test, and the second contains the pairs that did not.
The first dictionary retains the Id counter while the second is turned into a [`Id.Dict`](Id.Dict)
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> ( Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value, Internal.Dict () (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a Id-value pair from a dictionary. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a 'CounterDict' with a single Id-value pair
values.type: Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> value -> ( Internal.Id a, Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: size
values.comment: Determine the number of Id-value pairs in the dictionary.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Int

values.name: toDict
values.comment: Covert a Id.CounterDict into a regular (`Id.Dict`)[Id.Dict#Dict]
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a dictionary into an list of Id-value pairs, sorted by Ids.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List ( Internal.Id a, value )

values.name: union
values.comment: Combine two dictionaries. If there is a collision, preference is given to the first dictionary.
values.type: Internal.Dict counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a dictionary for a specific Id with a given function. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> (value -> value) -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all of the values in a dictionary, in the order of their Ids.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List value

name: Id.CounterList

unions.name: CounterList
unions.comment: A list with a id counter

values.name: add
values.comment: Add a value to the List and assign it a new [`Id`](Id#Id).
values.type: value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> ( Internal.Id a, Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: addAt
values.comment:
Add a value to the List, assign it a new [`Id`](Id#Id) and insert it at a given index.
Indexes lower than 0 will be inserted at index 0.
Indexes higher than the length of the list will inserted at the end of the list.
values.type: Basics.Int -> value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> ( Internal.Id a, Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: addInto
values.comment: Same as as [`add`](Id.List#add) but only returns the List
values.type: value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: addList
values.comment: Add a list of values to the List and assign them [`Id`](Id#Id)s
values.type: List.List value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: append
values.comment: Combine two Lists. If there is a collision, preference is given to the first List.
values.type: Id.List.List (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for [`CounterList`](Id.CounterList#CounterList)
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id does not appear in the second list.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList id b -> Id.List.List id c -> Id.CounterList.CounterList id b

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create a empty `CounterList`
values.type: Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode [`CounterList`](Id.CounterList#CounterList) to a JSON value
values.type: (value -> Json.Decode.Value) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id id) value -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only the Id-value pairs that pass the given test.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: filterMap
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in the list and filter out the values that return Nothing.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> Maybe.Maybe c) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) c

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Fold over the Id-value pairs in a list from left to right.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> c

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Fold over the Id-value pairs in a list from right to left.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> c

values.name: fromDict
values.comment: Convert a [`Id.CounterDict`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict) into a  CounterList.
values.type: Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: fromIdList
values.comment:
Create a new `CounterList` from a list of Id-value pairs.
This removes pairs with duplicate Ids
values.type: Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.List.List (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Create a new `CounterList` from a list of values and assign an [`Id`](Id#Id) to every value
values.type: Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> List.List value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value associated with a Id. If the Id is not found, return Nothing.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: getCounter
values.comment: Get the counter from a counter list
values.type: a -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: getFrom
values.comment: Same as [get](Id.List#get) but with the arguments swapped, useful for pipelines.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Internal.Id a -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: ids
values.comment: Get all of the Ids in a list, sorted from lowest to highest.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List (Internal.Id a)

values.name: insert
values.comment:
Insert a Id-value pair into a list.
If there is a existing pair with the same Id if will be replaced.
If there isn't a existing pair the pair will be inserted at the start of the list.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: insertAt
values.comment:
Insert a Id-value pair into a given index into a Id.List.
This will remove any existing value with the same Id.
Indexes lower than 0 will be inserted at index 0.
Indexes higher than the length of the list will inserted at the end of the list.
values.type: Basics.Int -> Internal.Id a -> value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id appears in the second list. Preference is given to values in the first list.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList id b -> Id.List.List id c -> Id.CounterList.CounterList id b

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a list is empty.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: leakyDecoder
values.comment:
A 'leaky' JSON Decoder for [`CounterList`](Id.CounterList#CounterList).
This decoder will try to succeed to even if parts of json value can't be decoded.
If the counter can't be decoded a new counter will be assigned, accounting for all used Ids in the list.
If any items in the list have a invalid Id they will be assigned a new Id.
If any items in the list cannot be decoded they will be skipped.
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: length
values.comment: Determine the number of Id-value pairs in the list.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Int

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a list.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) c

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a Id is in a list.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: move
values.comment: Move a existing value to a new index. Does nothing if the item is not present.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Basics.Int -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: partition
values.comment:
Partition a list according to some test.
The first list contains all Id-value pairs which passed the test, and the second contains the pairs that did not.
The first list retains the Id counter while the second is turned into a [`Id.List`](Id.List)
values.type: (id -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList id value -> ( Id.CounterList.CounterList id value, Id.List.List id value )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a Id-value pair from a list. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a 'CounterList' with a single Id-value pair
values.type: Internal.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> value -> ( Internal.Id a, Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: toDict
values.comment: Convert a CounterList into a [`Id.CounterDict`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict).
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterDict.CounterDict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a CounterList into a [`Id.List`](Id.List#List).
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: unzip
values.comment: Decompose a list of tuples into a tuple of lists.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList id ( a, b ) -> ( Id.CounterList.CounterList id a, Id.List.List id b )

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a list for a specific Id with a given function. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> (value -> value) -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all of the values in a list, in the order of their Ids.
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List value

name: Id.Dict

aliases.name: Dict_
aliases.comment: A type that can represent [`Id.Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict) and [`Id.CounterDict`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict)

values.name: accountForIds
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Counter.accountForIds`](Id.Counter#accountForIds) but can be used with a [`Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict)
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for [`Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict)
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.Dict.Dict id value)

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id does not appear in the second dictionary.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) b

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create a empty [`Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict)
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a [`Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict) to a JSON value
values.type: (value -> Json.Encode.Value) -> Id.Dict.Dict id value -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only the Id-value pairs that pass the given test.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: filterMap
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in the dictionary and filter out the values that return Nothing.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> Maybe.Maybe c) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) c

values.name: fold
values.comment: Fold over the Id-value pairs in a dictionary from lowest Id to highest Id.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> c

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert an list of Id-value pairs into a dictionary.
values.type: List.List ( Internal.Id a, value ) -> Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value associated with a Id. If the Id is not found, return Nothing.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: getFrom
values.comment: Same as [get](Id.Dict#get) but with the arguments swapped, useful for pipelines.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Internal.Id a -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: ids
values.comment: Get all of the Ids in a dictionary, sorted from lowest to highest.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List (Internal.Id a)

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a Id-value pair into a dictionary. Replaces value when there is a collision.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> value -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id appears in the second dictionary. Preference is given to values in the first dictionary.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) b

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a dictionary is empty.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: leakyDecoder
values.comment:
A 'leaky' JSON Decoder for [`Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict).
If any items in the dictionary cannot be decoded they will be skipped instead of failing the entire decoder.
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a dictionary.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) c

values.name: map2
values.comment: Apply a function to values that appear in both dictionaries and create a new dictionary with the results, values that don't appear in all dictionaries are skipped.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c -> d) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c1 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c1 (Internal.Id a) d

values.name: map3
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Dict.map2`](Id.Dict#map2) but for 3 dictionaries
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c1 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c3 (Internal.Id a) d -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c1 (Internal.Id a) e

values.name: map4
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Dict.map2`](Id.Dict#map2) but for 4 dictionaries
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c1 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c2 (Internal.Id a) c -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c3 (Internal.Id a) d -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c4 (Internal.Id a) e -> Id.Dict.Dict_ c1 (Internal.Id a) f

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a Id is in a dictionary.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: partition
values.comment: Partition a dictionary according to some test. The first dictionary contains all Id-value pairs which passed the test, and the second contains the pairs that did not.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> ( Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value, Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id a) value )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a Id-value pair from a dictionary. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a dictionary with a single Id-value pair
values.type: Internal.Id a -> value -> Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: size
values.comment: Determine the number of Id-value pairs in the dictionary.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a dictionary into an list of Id-value pairs, sorted by Ids.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List ( Internal.Id a, value )

values.name: union
values.comment: Combine two dictionaries. If there is a collision, preference is given to the first dictionary.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter2 (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a dictionary for a specific Id with a given function. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> (value -> value) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all of the values in a dictionary, in the order of their Ids.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> List.List value

name: Id.List

aliases.name: List
aliases.comment: A ordered list of Id-value pairs, is constructed as a List of Id-value Tuples.

values.name: accountForIds
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Counter.accountForIds`](Id.Counter#accountForIds) but can be used with a [`Id.List`](Id.List#List)
values.type: Id.List.List (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: append
values.comment: Combine two Lists. If there is a collision, preference is given to the first List.
values.type: Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for [`List`](Id.List#List)
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.List.List (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id does not appear in the second List.
values.type: Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c -> Id.List.List id b

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create a empty [`List`](Id.List#List)
values.type: Id.List.List id value

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a [`List`](Id.List#List) to a JSON value
values.type: (value -> Json.Encode.Value) -> Id.List.List (Internal.Id id) value -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only the Id-value pairs that pass the given test.
values.type: (id -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: filterMap
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in the List and filter out the values that return Nothing.
values.type: (id -> b -> Maybe.Maybe c) -> Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Reduce the list from the left.
values.type: (id -> value -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.List.List id value -> c

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Reduce the list from the left.
values.type: (id -> value -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.List.List id value -> c

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value associated with a Id. If the Id is not found, return Nothing.
values.type: id -> Id.List.List id value -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: getFrom
values.comment: Same as [get](Id.List#get) but with the arguments swapped, useful for pipelines.
values.type: Id.List.List id value -> id -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: ids
values.comment: Get all of the Ids in the List.
values.type: Id.List.List id value -> Core.List id

values.name: insert
values.comment:
Insert a Id-value pair into a Id.List.
If there is a existing pair with the same Id if will be replaced.
If there isn't a existing pair the pair will be inserted at the start of the list.
values.type: id -> value -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: insertAt
values.comment:
Insert a Id-value pair into a given index into a Id.List.
This will remove any existing value with the same Id.
Indexes lower than 0 will be inserted at index 0.
Indexes higher than the length of the list will inserted at the end of the list.
values.type: Basics.Int -> id -> value -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Keep a Id-value pair when its Id appears in the second List. Preference is given to values in the first List.
values.type: Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c -> Id.List.List id b

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a Id.List is empty.
values.type: Id.List.List id value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: leakyDecoder
values.comment:
A 'leaky' JSON Decoder for [`List`](Id.List#List).
If any items in the list cannot be decoded they will be skipped instead of failing the entire decoder.
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder value -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.List.List (Internal.Id id) value)

values.name: length
values.comment: Determine the number of Id-value pairs in the List.
values.type: Id.List.List id value -> Basics.Int

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a Id.List.
values.type: (id -> b -> c) -> Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c

values.name: map2
values.comment: Apply a function to values that appear in both Lists and create a new List with the results, values that don't appear in all Lists are skipped.
values.type: (id -> a -> b -> c) -> Id.List.List id a -> Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c

values.name: map3
values.comment: Same as [`Id.List.map2`](Id.List#map2) but for 3 Lists
values.type: (id -> a -> b -> c -> d) -> Id.List.List id a -> Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c -> Id.List.List id d

values.name: map4
values.comment: Same as [`Id.List.map2`](Id.List#map2) but for 4 Lists
values.type: (id -> a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> Id.List.List id a -> Id.List.List id b -> Id.List.List id c -> Id.List.List id d -> Id.List.List id e

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a Id is in a Id.List.
values.type: id -> Id.List.List id value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: move
values.comment: Move a existing value to a new index. Does nothing if the item is not present.
values.type: id -> Basics.Int -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: partition
values.comment: Partition a Id.List according to some test. The first List contains all Id-value pairs which passed the test, and the second contains the pairs that did not.
values.type: (id -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.List.List id value -> ( Id.List.List id value, Id.List.List id value )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a Id-value pair from a Id.List. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: id -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: removeDuplicateIds
values.comment: Removes pairs that have a duplicate Id. Retains the last pair.
values.type: Core.List ( id, value ) -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a Id.List with a single Id-value pair
values.type: id -> value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: unzip
values.comment: Decompose a list of tuples into a tuple of lists.
values.type: Id.List.List id ( a, b ) -> ( Id.List.List id a, Id.List.List id b )

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a Id.List for a specific Id with a given function. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: id -> (value -> value) -> Id.List.List id value -> Id.List.List id value

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all of the values in the List.
values.type: Id.List.List id value -> Core.List value

name: Id.Set

aliases.name: Set
aliases.comment: A set type for Ids, is equal to a [`Id.Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict) with empty tuples as values

aliases.name: Set_
aliases.comment: A type that can represent [`Id.Set`](Id.Set#Set) and [`Id.CounterDict id ()`](Id.CounterDict#CounterDict)

values.name: accountForIds
values.comment: Same as [`Id.Counter.accountForIds`](Id.Counter#accountForIds) but can be used with a [`Set`](Id.Set#Set)
values.type: Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Counter.Counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: decoder
values.comment: JSON Decoder for [`Set`](Id.Set#Set)
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.Set.Set id)

values.name: diff
values.comment: Get the difference between the first set and the second. Keeps Ids that do not appear in the second set.
values.type: Id.Set.Set_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter2 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Set.Set_ counter1 (Internal.Id a)

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create a empty [`Set`](Id.Set#Set)
values.type: Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a)

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode [`Set`](Id.Set#Set) to a JSON value
values.type: Id.Set.Set id -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only the Ids that pass the given test.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: fold
values.comment: Fold over the Ids in a set from lowest Id to highest Id.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> c -> c) -> c -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> c

values.name: fromCounterList
values.comment: Create a set with the Ids from a [`Id.CounterList`](Id.CounterList#CounterList)
values.type: Id.CounterList.CounterList (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a)

values.name: fromDict
values.comment: Create a set with the Ids from a [`Id.Dict`](Id.Dict#Dict)
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a)

values.name: fromIdList
values.comment: Create a set with the Ids from a [`Id.List`](Id.List#List)
values.type: Id.List.List (Internal.Id a) value -> Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a)

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Create a set from a list of Ids
values.type: List.List (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a)

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a Id into a set.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Get the intersection of two sets. Keeps Ids that appear in both sets.
values.type: Id.Set.Set_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Dict.Dict_ counter2 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Set.Set_ counter1 (Internal.Id a)

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a set is empty.
values.type: Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Basics.Bool

values.name: leakyDecoder
values.comment:
A 'leaky' JSON Decoder for [`Set`](Id.Set#Set).
Any invalid Ids will be skipped instead of failing the entire decoder.
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder (Id.Set.Set id)

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a Id is in a set.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Basics.Bool

values.name: partition
values.comment: Partition a set according to some test. The first set contains all Ids which passed the test, and the second contains the Ids that did not.
values.type: (Internal.Id a -> Basics.Bool) -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> ( Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a), Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a) )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a Id from a set. If the Id is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a)

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a set with a single Id
values.type: Internal.Id a -> Id.Set.Set (Internal.Id a)

values.name: size
values.comment: Determine the number of Ids in the set.
values.type: Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Get all of the Ids in a set, sorted from lowest to highest.
values.type: Id.Set.Set_ counter (Internal.Id a) -> List.List (Internal.Id a)

values.name: union
values.comment: Get the union of two sets. Keep all Ids.
values.type: Id.Dict.Dict_ counter1 (Internal.Id a) b -> Id.Set.Set_ counter2 (Internal.Id a) -> Id.Set.Set_ counter2 (Internal.Id a)
